user.title: Maytronics Dolphin (BLE)
user.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your Dolphin robot (as shown in the Bluetooth integration or nRF Connect).

init.title: Maytronics Dolphin options
init.description: HA connects only for each command/poll, then disconnects so the robot is not held on Bluetooth. If the unit freezes with the BT light on, use Release Bluetooth or power-cycle once, then try these settings.
